name: @query1988/workout-tracker
description: 个人健身跟踪器 — 通过文字记录健身训练数据，自动解析动作、组数、次数和重量，实时写入本地 MySQL 数据库
author: query1988

securityNotes.databasePassword: Never commit passwords to version control. Use environment variables or .env files.
securityNotes.localDatabase: This skill only connects to local MySQL databases for security.
securityNotes.permissions: Database user should have minimal permissions (INSERT/SELECT/UPDATE/DELETE only).
